name: Circuit Master
author: Poki
description: Circuit Master is a puzzle game where you aim to get a green light by connecting the circuit correctly! Arrange the wires, fans, and machines in the right places, then turn on the button to see the electricity flow. Only the correctly connected circuit will make the green light shine. Solve the puzzle quickly to save your battery, and use hints if you need help. Can you become the ultimate circuit master? How to play Circuit Master? Click to select the part, and drag to move its position. Who created Circuit Master? Circuit Master is created by Beedo Games. Play their other games on Poki: Idle Gold Miner , Chicken Merge , Base Defense 2 , Pirate Defense , Call of Tanks , Base Defense , Blocky Snakes , Clash Of Armour , Clash of Skulls , Clash of Tanks , dark-boy, Jelly Sokoban , Mafia Wars , Idle Cowshed , Swingers , and Tanko.io ! How can I play Circuit Master for free? You can play Circuit Master for free on Poki. Can I play Circuit Master on mobile devices and desktop? Circuit Master can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
